input_ref: runtime error: mobile-shell Android bundling failed
output_summary: Root cause identified: CenteredMessage in packages/shared/src/components/centered-message.tsx imported @wh-label/ui/card and @wh-label/ui/button — web-only DOM components — which cannot be resolved by React Native/Expo bundler in mobile-shell. Fix: move CenteredMessage to packages/betting (the sole consumer), remove from shared's component index.

Created packages/betting/src/components/shared/centered-message.tsx. Removed packages/shared/src/components/centered-message.tsx. Removed export from packages/shared/src/components/index.ts. Updated imports in 3 betting files: layout-compact/ticket-content, layout-default/ticket-content, my-bets — now import from local relative path. No new libraries. No protected areas touched. No commits.

PASS. CenteredMessage fully removed from packages/shared (grep confirms 0 occurrences). No new CenteredMessage references in mobile-shell import chain. Pre-existing tsc errors in betting/shared are unrelated to this change. web-shell unaffected (it never used CenteredMessage). No commits made.

Starting Task 3: move all remaining web-only exports from packages/shared main barrel into dedicated subpath exports. Scope: packages/shared, packages/betting, apps/web-shell. Affected symbols: useIsMobile, useInfinityScroll, useScrollArrows, useScrollThreshold, beforeInjection, MatchSides, WalletTabSelector, all auth components (LoginModal, ForgotPasswordModal, SignUpModal, AuthPageLayout, Login, ForgotPassword, RecoveryPassword, ActivateAccount, Signup, OtpDialog, SignupDialog, EmailNotification, PasswordInput).

Created: packages/shared/src/components/web/index.ts (re-exports auth, match-sides, wallet-tab-selector), packages/shared/src/hooks/web/index.ts (re-exports use-mobile, use-infinity-scroll, use-scroll-arrows, use-scroll-threshold.hook), packages/shared/src/utils/web/index.ts (re-exports beforeInjection from image-utils). Added 3 new subpath exports to packages/shared/package.json: ./components/web, ./hooks/web, ./utils/web. Removed from packages/shared/src/index.ts: use-mobile, use-infinity-scroll, use-scroll-arrows, use-scroll-threshold.hook, centered-message, auth, match-sides, wallet-tab-selector, beforeInjection (only getImageUrl kept from image-utils). Rebuilt packages/shared/src/components/index.ts to only export for/show/switch. Updated 26 web-shell files and 12 betting files to import from new subpaths. Fixed packages/shared/src/components/auth/ files that self-imported useIsMobile from @wh-label/shared circular path — now use direct relative import to ../../hooks/use-mobile. No new libraries. No protected areas touched. No commits.

PASS. tsc --noEmit on apps/web-shell: 0 new errors introduced. 5 pre-existing betting errors unrelated to this change remain (loadingFilter$, TicketFooterIconProps, language property, implicit any). Grep confirms no web-only symbols (useIsMobile, useInfinityScroll, useScrollArrows, useScrollThreshold, MatchSides, WalletTabSelector, beforeInjection, auth modals) remain imported from @wh-label/shared main barrel in any consumer. packages/shared main barrel is now safe for mobile-shell bundler. No new libraries. No protected areas touched. No commits.
